decision: The exact OMP pin does not expose a complete all-three pure closure that can run in the mandatory Node >=22.19 lane without Bun, native, filesystem, process, network, session, TUI, or edit authority. Migration terminates before ancestry/source/product integration.

agentReceipts.note: Receipts are supplementary; the durable reports and source identities below are independently reviewable evidence.

readClosureFiles.authority: filesystem/process/network/session: fs probes, process.platform, InternalUrlRouter, and Bun-backed scope resolution; partial selector helpers are not a complete read seam
session/edit: resolveFileDisplayMode requires FileDisplayModeSession settings/tool availability and resolveEditMode; not session-free presentation
native: enclosingBlockBoundaries plus logger; native parse/fallback module is not an authority-free read seam
Bun/process/TUI closure: OutputSink uses Bun.file(...).writer and imports render-utils; truncation helpers are partial output handling, not read planning/presentation

minimumOperations.candidateSchemaNote: Verified negative: no complete public read seam exists. Private candidates have no public callable schema, and no pure fixture can be invoked without forbidden extraction or reimplementation; this is verified missing-seam evidence, not missing testing.

authorityMatrix.bun: present: bun:sqlite import and Bun.file/Bun.hash/Bun.write uses
authorityMatrix.process: present in inspected path-utils support through process.platform

minimumOperations.deterministicFixtureProbe: No qualifying deterministic pure probe exists because no public immutable-input planner/presenter seam exists.
minimumOperations.reason: The only runtime exports are an effectful session tool and a TUI renderer. Private helpers are incomplete or require prohibited extraction; importing the module itself carries forbidden authority.

searchClosureFiles.authority: filesystem/process/network/session/Bun: fs probes, process.platform, InternalUrlRouter, external materialization, and Bun.file stat in scope resolution
path/tree formatting only; deterministic fragments are incomplete search presentation
authority-free one-line formatter, but no source tag lifecycle or complete search seam
process/settings/TUI: reads process.stdout.rows and imports settings/TUI renderer dependencies; not a pure-source module closure

minimumOperations.candidateSchemaNote: Verified negative: no complete public seam accepts immutable query/scope plus OMK-supplied matches. Private candidates have no public callable schema; exported leaves are fragments, so no pure fixture can be invoked without prohibited reimplementation. This is verified missing-seam evidence, not missing testing.
topLevelInitialization: text asset import attribute and runtime module imports
render-utils reads process.stdout in its closure

authorityMatrix.session: present: ToolSession, settings, snapshots, seen-line store

minimumOperations.deterministicFixtureProbe: Exported leaves are deterministic only as fragments; no complete immutable query/scope plus OMK-supplied-matches seam exists.
minimumOperations.reason: GrepTool performs authority acquisition and native search; the renderer is TUI-only; private request/result planning cannot be composed without prohibited reimplementation or extraction.

minimumOperations.operation: Parse an untrusted patch string to proposed edits and expectedLineHashes[] without a read or mutation.

modules.authority: lexical path handling and pure parsing behavior; no I/O
pure in-memory apply; cloneCursor is imported from tokenizer.ts
pure transform over caller-supplied resolver/text; no I/O
static closure defect: computeFileHash calls Bun.hash.xxHash32

patcher.sectionResult: PatchSectionResult { path: string; canonicalPath: string; op: "create" | "update" | "delete" | "noop"; before: string; after: string; persisted: string; written: string; fileHash: string; header: string; firstChangedLine?: number; warnings: string[]; moveDest?: string; blockResolutions?: BlockResolution[] }

outputShapes.edits: insert/delete/block edit variants contain line-number anchors and no expectedLineHashes[]
outputShapes.expectedLineHashes: Absent: no Edit variant or Anchor contains expectedLineHashes[].

boundaryClassification.PatchSection.applyTo: in-memory transform of caller-supplied text; does not validate section tag
boundaryClassification.Patcher: filesystem/snapshot mutation authority: prepare/preflight read and validate; commit writes/deletes/moves and records snapshots
boundaryClassification.directSubpath: narrower than root but retains static format.ts closure
boundaryClassification.rootBarrel: broad: index.ts re-exports fs, patcher, recovery, snapshots, stream, and application surfaces

authorityMatrix.edit: none in parsing behavior; Patcher separately has mutation authority
authorityMatrix.nodePath: node:path is lexical and uses caller-supplied cwd
authorityMatrix.bun: present in static closure: format.ts contains Bun.hash.xxHash32

minimumOperations.deterministicFixtureProbe: Durable probe report records deterministic Bun source parsing and a tree-shaken Node bundle parse, while raw Node v22.22.3 direct import fails on extensionless TypeScript imports. The bundle is evidence only, not an approved source-bound closure.
minimumOperations.reason: Parsing is registry-free but produces only line-number edits and optional section-level fileHash, not expectedLineHashes[]. Raw Node cannot import the source unchanged, and static format.ts contains Bun authority.

board.reason: All three minimum operations must pass; read and search have no exported pure seam, and hashline-apply does not provide expectedLineHashes[] in an approved unchanged Node source closure.
board.effect: Do not add OMP ancestry refs, vendor source, omp-bridge, compatibility firewall, product integration, or publication to the owner checkout.
